content.en:
After returning to the human realm, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate with all his might, striving to transform the forbidden Dao power into the forbidden power as soon as possible.

Converting all the forbidden Dao power into forbidden power is just a waste of time and resources.

Ye Tian possessed a large number of cultivation forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures, so he was not afraid of resource consumption.

10,000 years, 10,000 years have passed.

Ye Tian's forbidden Dao power at the beginning was only seventy percent into forbidden power, but now it is gradually transforming into eighty percent.

After 130,000 years, eighty percent of Ye Tian's forbidden dao power had been transformed into forbidden power.

After 320,000 years, the forbidden Dao power has been transformed into eighty into five!

Nine hundred and thirty0,000 years later, the forbidden Dao power was transformed into ninety percent.

After 1,460,000 years, the forbidden Dao power has been transformed into ninety and five.

......

Three million years have passed.

At this time, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm had changed too much, and it was already infinitely close to the Ancient Realm.

Moreover, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm also gave birth to many invincible Dao Ancestors.

For example, Ye Tian's sons and daughters have also stepped into the realm of invincible Dao Ancestors, his wife and sister have also stepped into this level, and Black Wind Mountain has also given birth to several new half-step domain ancestors.

Even the Nine Heavenly Forces of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm have given birth to several, such as the Heavenly Sword Sect, King Kong City, and other old Eight Heavenly Forces have also stepped into the Nine Heavenly Forces.

They may have been in decline for a while, but the foundation is still there, so it is not difficult to impact the Nine Heavens Force.

And the strength of the human race has also become very strong, the strongest Dao Ancestors have appeared one by one, and Dao Ancestors have also been born in large numbers.

In the past, Dao Ancestor could also be called the high-level of the Terran race, but now the Terran is no longer a high-level, only the strongest Dao Ancestor can be regarded as a high-level.

However, the rest of the Terran race did not become invincible Dao Ancestors.

In this era, it is not difficult to become a supreme Dao Ancestor, but it is very difficult to impact the invincible Dao Ancestor, and there are still only a few Supreme Dao Ancestors who are qualified to impact the ranks of the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

What no one knows is that Ye Tian has already faced an important juncture.

---------------------

"Ninety percent of the forbidden Dao power has been transformed into forbidden power, and it is only the last point!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Once the last bit of refining was completed, the Dao power in his whole body was an extremely pure forbidden power.

At that time, he will truly step into the realm of the Extreme Dao, and the whole person will undergo tremendous changes, and there will be a terrifying power of the power of the Extreme Dao.

As for the Extreme Dao realm, he only knew about it from the Extreme Dao inheritance, but he had not seen it.

Now, he had finally seen how powerful the Extreme Dao Realm was.

A few more days had passed, and the last bit of forbidden Dao power had also been transformed into the purest forbidden power.

The immortal soul, the purest forbidden power, ten percent of the forbidden body.

At this moment, Ye Tian's spirit and spirit had reached the Extreme Dao level in all three aspects, and the whole person had reached the Extreme Dao realm at the Invincible Dao Ancestor level.

Bang!!!!

The body, soul, and forbidden power are all undergoing transformation, and Ye Tian's breath is becoming stronger and stronger.

After a long time.

Ye Tian finally completed the transformation of the Extreme Dao Realm and officially stepped into the Extreme Dao Realm.

The human world, the void.

Ye Tian stood here, the spirit in his hand instantly condensed into a trace of power, and the appearance of this trace of power made the void tremble, as if a light blow could pierce the void of the human realm.

"This is the power of the Extreme Dao, it is really powerful, far beyond the ordinary power!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, with his current realm, if he wanted to exert the power of the Extreme Dao for a long time, he would not be able to do it at all, and that would consume a huge amount of essence and spirit.

Under normal circumstances, his combat power was now comparable to the top-notch Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and he could be called the invincible level of the Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, but if he exerted the power of the Extreme Dao, he even had the ability to fight with the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor a little.

It's just a fight, a long-term fight is definitely not good, he has exhausted the power of the Extreme Dao, and he can't beat the true Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

But how many ancestors of the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain of the Dao Mountain Realm are there?

At present, there are two half-step domain ancestors in the Guiyi Realm, two in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, one in the Black Wind Mountain, and maybe a few are hidden, but there are definitely not many.

Moreover, he is now an invincible Dao Ancestor, and he has reached the Extreme Dao realm, if it is not long before the realm is completely stable, try to comprehend some domain ancestor mysteries, and he can impact the half-step domain ancestor realm.

Once he became a half-step domain ancestor, his strength would inevitably reach the level of a half-step domain ancestor of the Returning One Realm, and it was not a weak level, but comparable to a powerful one-step Domain Ancestor.

"Accidentally, I have already surpassed the ordinary half-step domain ancestor and become the true top existence of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

A big thing happened in Black Wind Mountain, and Jinchen Dao Ancestor hit the level of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Returning One Realm.

Originally, Jinchen Dao Ancestor was the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and he continued to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue, and once again entered the Three Refining Void.

Therefore, this time, he finally broke the shackles and was promoted to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor level of the Returning One Realm.

The breakthrough of Jinchen Dao Ancestor means that Black Wind Mountain has two Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, which are completely level with the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Besides, the two Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace together couldn't beat the Wind Mountain Lord!

Therefore, the strength of the Heavenly Emperor Palace was not as good as that of Black Wind Mountain.

In addition, Ye Tian can be regarded as a half-one-realm half-step domain ancestor, and with Ye Tian's words, the Black Wind Mountain completely crushed the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

A few more days passed.

All the powerhouses above the half-step domain ancestor were dignified, because the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was about to be promoted to the Ancient Realm.

The general Ancient Realm is not as good as the Domain Realm, but the Xuan Xuan Ancient Realm has the potential to be promoted to the Forbidden Realm, so from the perspective of the origin, it is not weaker than the ordinary Domain Realm, and even more than a lot.

Therefore, once the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is really born, the Devouring Clan may invade the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

But they also hoped that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm would be born, so that the cultivation environment would be better, and there would be more opportunities for birth.

But they were afraid of the existence of the Devourers, so they were very entangled.

But in any case, the birth of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is inevitable.
